inputs.shares_source: FY2025 diluted net income $92.149M / diluted EPS $1.37 (ACMR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_013231.htm)
inputs.fcf_source: Mid-cycle operating income proxy $130.2M ÷ 67.262M shares; FY2025 OCF $10.325M (trough working-capital year) per ACMR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_013231.htm
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 revenue grew 15% YoY but operating income fell on margin mix and working-capital build; Lawrence base uses mid-cycle operating income, not peak 2024 margins or trough OCF.

bear.notes: Semicap down-cycle, China fab slowdown, margin compression

base.notes: Mid-cycle wet clean share gains; deferred revenue converts; exit 8× owner cash

bull.notes: Advanced packaging ramp and electroplating adoption accelerate

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Equipment and inventory carried at cost; no land-at-zero pattern (10-K)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant assets?
option_scan.evidence: Operating equipment vendor; no royalty or land reserve pattern

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Noncontrolling interest $27.8M; subsidiary equity issuances dilute look-through

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Deferred revenue $252M at 12/31/2025; modeled in advanced_packaging_backlog_option

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Equity method investments $10.3M income FY2025; immaterial to consolidated value

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No litigation recovery or special dividend catalyst

growth_explanation.mechanism: Revenue scales with wafer fab equipment spending on wet clean, electroplating, and advanced packaging tools; deferred revenue converts as tools ship and install.

falsifiers.trigger: Operating cash flow stays below $50M for two consecutive fiscal years while revenue grows
Operating margin falls below 8% for four consecutive quarters without backlog recovery

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map wet clean equipment owner cash, advanced packaging backlog option, net financial claims, and cycle/concentration reserve once each.

components.label: Wet clean and electroplating equipment operations

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ACMR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_013231.htm: FY2025 revenue $901.309M, operating income $109.429M, cash $757.373M, total debt $214.012M, deferred revenue $252.486M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 diluted shares (diluted net income / diluted EPS)

source.locator: FY2025 diluted net income $92.149M / diluted EPS $1.37

assumptions.label: Normalized owner cash per diluted share (mid-cycle operating income proxy)
assumptions.rationale: Mid-cycle operating income per share anchors wet clean and electroplating equipment economics; FY2025 GAAP operating cash flow was depressed by working-capital build.

assumptions.label: Duration-adjusted owner-cash capitalization multiple
assumptions.rationale: Bear stresses semicap down-cycle and margin compression; base mid-cycle eight-year path; bull modest share gains without peak-cycle heroics.

calculations.label: Wet clean equipment engine per share

valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

source.locator: FY2025 diluted net income $92,149M / diluted EPS $1.37

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted advanced packaging and electroplating backlog economics

calculations.label: Advanced packaging backlog option per share

assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for fab spending slowdown, China customer concentration, and FY2025 working-capital absorption not fully embedded in mid-cycle owner-cash multiple.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ACMR, including wet clean equipment owner cash, backlog option, net financial claims, and cycle reserve.
economic_claim.unit_source: FY2025 diluted net income $92.149M / diluted EPS $1.37 (ACMR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_013231.htm)
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and option claims are valued once; cash, debt, and reserves are separate components with unique overlap keys.

component_groups.label: Wet clean and electroplating equipment operations
component_groups.economic_claim: Wet clean and electroplating equipment operations
component_groups.adjustments: Margin and working-capital stress in cycle reserve.

component_groups.label: Advanced packaging and deferred-revenue backlog option
component_groups.economic_claim: Advanced packaging and deferred-revenue backlog option
component_groups.adjustments: Low case zero; base does not assume full backlog NPV.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Deferred revenue $252M at 12/31/2025; base assumes partial conversion over three years without heroics.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Backlog ships as advanced packaging tools install; [Assumption] 3-year base.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Incremental capex for backlog fulfillment embedded in normalized owner cash; no separate remaining-capital claim.

component_groups.economic_claim: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.adjustments: Low/high stress cash and debt bands.

component_groups.economic_claim: Semicap cycle, customer concentration, and working-capital reserve

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Wet clean and electroplating equipment operations
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

method_route.label: Predictable cash-flow security
failure_modes: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

pricing_analysis.economic_claim_note: Per-share claims use fully diluted shares from valuation.inputs.
pricing_analysis.implied_growth_contract: Constant 7-year owner-cash growth with a 8x terminal owner-cash multiple; diagnostic, not forecast.
falsifiers: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
pricing_analysis.pricing_conclusion: Entry prices were computed mechanically from the routed power-zone profile (Predictable cash-flow security). They are decision inputs, not a decision; the owner must review the scenarios before acting.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ACMR, including wet clean equipment owner cash, backlog option, net financial claims, and cycle reserve.
economic_claim.unit_source: FY2025 diluted net income $92.149M / diluted EPS $1.37 (ACMR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001628280_26_013231.htm)
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating and option claims are valued once; cash, debt, and reserves are separate components with unique overlap keys.

component_groups.label: Wet clean and electroplating equipment operations
component_groups.economic_claim: Wet clean and electroplating equipment operations
component_groups.adjustments: Margin and working-capital stress in cycle reserve.

component_groups.label: Advanced packaging and deferred-revenue backlog option
component_groups.economic_claim: Advanced packaging and deferred-revenue backlog option
component_groups.adjustments: Low case zero; base does not assume full backlog NPV.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Deferred revenue $252M at 12/31/2025; base assumes partial conversion over three years without heroics.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Backlog ships as advanced packaging tools install; [Assumption] 3-year base.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Incremental capex for backlog fulfillment embedded in normalized owner cash; no separate remaining-capital claim.

component_groups.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.adjustments: Low/high stress cash and debt bands.

component_groups.label: Semicap cycle, customer concentration, and working-capital reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Semicap cycle, customer concentration, and working-capital reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Negative reserve for OCF trough and geo concentration.
